function Sum(s: seq<int>): int\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 then 0 else Sum(s[..|s|-1]) + s[|s|-1]\n}\n\n// Occupancy after processing all stops described by a and b:\n// total who boarded minus total who exited\nghost function Occupancy(a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>): int\n  requires |a| == |b|\n{\n  Sum(b) - Sum(a)\n}\n\n// A capacity is valid if it is non-negative and never exceeded\n// at any stop (after the first k stops, for every k from 1 to n)\nghost predicate IsValidCapacity(c: int, n: int, a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>)\n  requires 0 <= n <= |a| && n <= |b|\n{\n  c >= 0 &&\n  forall k | 1 <= k <= n :: Occupancy(a[..k], b[..k]) <= c\n}\n\n// The minimum capacity: valid, and no smaller value is valid\nghost predicate IsMinimumCapacity(c: int, n: int, a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>)\n  requires 0 <= n <= |a| && n <= |b|\n{\n  IsValidCapacity(c, n, a, b) &&\n  forall c' | 0 <= c' < c :: !IsValidCapacity(c', n, a, b)\n}\n\nlemma SumAppend(s: seq<int>, x: int)\n  ensures Sum(s + [x]) == Sum(s) + x\n{\n  if |s| == 0 {\n    assert s + [x] == [x];\n  } else {\n    assert (s + [x])[..|s + [x]| - 1] == s;\n  }\n}\n\nmethod Tram(n: int, a: seq<int>, b: seq<int>) returns (capacity: int)\n  requires 0 <= n <= |a| && n <= |b|\n  ensures IsMinimumCapacity(capacity, n, a, b)\n{\n  var current := 0;\n  capacity := 0;\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < n\n    invariant 0 <= i <= n\n    invariant current == Occupancy(a[..i], b[..i])\n    invariant capacity >= 0\n    invariant forall k | 1 <= k <= i :: Occupancy(a[..k], b[..k]) <= capacity\n    invariant capacity == 0 || exists k | 1 <= k <= i :: capacity == Occupancy(a[..k], b[..k])\n  {\n    assert a[..i+1] == a[..i] + [a[i]];\n    assert b[..i+1] == b[..i] + [b[i]];\n    SumAppend(a[..i], a[i]);\n    SumAppend(b[..i], b[i]);\n    current := current - a[i] + b[i];\n    if current > capacity {\n      capacity := current;\n    }\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11343,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":11343},"output_tokens":14,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"709255fb-5322-4914-8e19-b7c2ab807416","uuid":"d396f9b7-9654-474c-aae9-2b885c4cdae1"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"0fd2ea8f-aea6-406c-989d-ef8a870a5c81","session_id":"709255fb-5322-4914-8e19-b7c2ab807416"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NPGoKDVFJKPFRVGaKGGwF6","type":"tool_result","content":"File
